qrBuilder.title: Gukora QR ya Menu
qrBuilder.subtitle: Kora QR yuzuye mu minota mike. Hitamo template, hindura ibintu bike, bika hanyuma ukurure.

hero.title: Hindura buri meza
hero.subtitle: Gabanya igihe cyo gutegereza, korera abakiriya benshi, kandi utunganya ibikorwa byawe—gutumiza ukoresheje QR (Impishabanga shusho), POS (sisitemu yo kwishyuriraho), n'amakuru ya AI kuri platforme imwe.
hero.description: Byakozwe kuri resitora, amahoteli, bar, na kafe.
hero.rt_os: Sisitemu ikorera mu gihe nyacyo: reba buri kugurisha, buri meza, n'ibikorwa by'abakiriya byose — kandi wongere inyungu ku buryo bwikora.

0.title: Hindura buri meza
0.subtitle: Garagara. Bona Commande. Kura vuba.
0.description: Gabanya igihe cyo gutegereza, korera abakiriya benshi, kandi utunganye ibikorwa byawe — QR, POS, na AI byose muri platforme imwe.

1.title: Gutumiza ukoresheje QR byihuse
1.subtitle: Abakiriya batumiza kuri telefoni zabo
1.description: Sikana, reba menu, utume ibyo ukeneye ako kanya. Nta porogaramu isabwa. Nta guhagarika abakozi. Ni imikorere isobanutse.

2.title: Ubushishozi bwa AI
2.highlight: Ukugezwa Ku Ntego bishingiye ku Makuru
2.subtitle: Menya ubucuruzi bwawe mu mizi yabwo
2.description: Kurikirana igurishwa, ugenzure ibisabwa, unoze imicungire y’ububiko, kandi ufate ibyemezo byiza wifashishije inama za AI.

3.title: Platforme imwe ikubiyemo byose
3.subtitle: POS, QR, Ububiko, Isesengura
3.description: Reka kujarajara muri sisitemu nyinshi. Kurikirana unamenye ibyatumwe, ububiko, abakozi, na raporo byose mu rubuga rumwe rusobanutse.

features.title: Ibyo ukeneye byose ngo uyobore ubucuruzi bwawe mu buryo buhamye.
features.subtitle: Kuva ku ma commande kugeza ku gutanga ibicuruzwa, uhereye ku mibare y’ubucuruzi kugeza ku mashami menshi — Imboni Serve ikubiyemo byose ubucuruzi bwawe bukeneye.
features.qr_ordering_desc: Abakiriya barasikana, bakareba menu yawe, bagakora commande kuri telefoni zabo — nta app ikenewe.
features.inventory_desc: Kurikirana ibiri mu bubiko, shyiraho aho wongera gutumiza, kandi ucunge ibicuruzwa byose ugura. Ubone raporo zuzuye z’ibikorwa byose byakozwe.
features.reports_desc: Raporo za buri munsi, buri cyumweru, n’ukwezi. Menya neza amafaranga winjiza, ibiguzi n’inyungu mu buryo bworoshye.
features.ai_insights_desc: Inama z’ubwenge zo kongera gutumiza n’imenyesha ry’ibiciro bitagenda neza, bigufasha kurinda inyungu zawe.
features.discovery_feed_desc: Tangaza inkuru, promo n’amafoto. Orohereza abakiriya kuvumbura ubucuruzi bwawe no gutumiza mu buryo bwihuse kuri feed yawe
features.smart_slips_desc: Inyemezabuguzi zikoreshwa mu buryo bwikora, zerekana ibisobanuro birambuye by’ibyo waguze, n’ibihembo byo gutumira abandi binyuze kuri WhatsApp.
features.loyalty_desc: Ubaka ukwizerwa mu bakiriya bawe ukoresheje amanota, ibyiciro (tiers), n’igenzura ry’ibihembo uko bagenda bagaruka kugura kenshi.
features.promotions_desc: Shyiraho igabanyirizwa rishingiye ku bihe n'utundi tuntu runaka, bitangira kandi bikarangira mu buryo bwikora.
features.whatsapp_desc: Akira amamenyesha y'itumiza (commande), incamake za buri munsi, n'amamenyesha y’uko ububiko bugiye gushira, byose kuri WhatsAp.
features.mobile_money_desc: Emera MTN MoMo na Airtel Money — nta terminal yo kwishyura ikenewe.
features.multi_branch_desc: Cunga amashami menshi ukoresheje dashboard imwe, ubone raporo zihuriweho n’izihariye kuri buri shami.
features.roles_desc: Cashier, umuseriveri, supervisor, na manager — buri wese abona ibyo akeneye gusa.

advanced.title: Ibindi byinshi mu isanduku
advanced.subtitle: Ubushobozi bwateye imbere buboneka kuri gahunda zo hejuru — byose byubatswe imbere, nta bikoresho byo hanze bikenewe.
advanced.hotel_mode_desc: Imicungire y’icyumba, serivisi n’ahakirwa abakiriya byose biri muri sisitemu.
advanced.site_builder_desc: Tangiza urubuga rwawe (website) ukoresheje templates zihindurwa uko ushaka — nta bumenyi bwa coding bukenewe.
advanced.ai_menu_desc: Ohereza ifoto cyangwa inyandiko ya PDF, ureke AI igukorere menu yawe mu buryo bwikora.
advanced.marketplace_desc: Shyirwa ku rutonde rusange aho abakiriya bashakisha ahantu ho kurya.
advanced.referral_desc: Sangiza, winjize — Abakiriya batumira inshuti zabo bagahita babona ibihembo mu buryo bwikora.
advanced.staff_desc: Uburenganzira bushingiye ku nshingano busobanuye neza uruhare rwa buri wese: cashier, supervisor, manager, n’abandi.

discovery.title: Vumburwa n'abakiriya bashaka uburambe buhebuje
discovery.subtitle: Andikisha ubucuruzi bwawe ku isoko ry' Imboni Serve. Tangaza ibirimo, ibishushanyo, n'ibyiza bya buri munsi — abakiriya bakubona kandi batumize ku buryo bwihuse.

payments.title: 🇷🇼 Kwishyura Guteguriye u Rwanda
payments.subtitle: Emera uburyo bwose bwo kwishyura abakiriya bawe bakoresha mu buzima bwa buri munsi.

final_cta.title: Witeguye guzamura ubucuruzi bwawe?
final_cta.subtitle: Ufatanye n'ubucuruzi burenga 500 bwo kwakira abakiriya mu Rwanda bukoresha Imboni Serve. Tangira igerageza ryawe ry'ubuntu ry'iminsi 14 uyu munsi — nta karita y'inguzanyo ikenewe.

footer.copyright: Imboni Serve. Yubakiwe ubucuruzi bwo kwakira abakiriya.

how_it_works.title: Uko Bikorwa
how_it_works.subtitle: Intambwe 6 zoroshye zo kujyana ubucuruzi bwawe mu ikoranabuhanga no gutangira gutanga serivisi mu buryo buhanitse
how_it_works.step1_desc: Iyandikishe mu minota 2. Uzuza izina ry'ubucuruzi bwawe, ahantu ukorera, n'amakuru ya nyir'ubucuruzi, Ubone ikibaho (dashboard) cyawe mu kanya nkako guhumbya.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Ongeraho ibiryo n'ibinyobwa hamwe n'amafoto, ibiciro n'ibisobanuro. Koresha AI Menu Builder kugira ngo Ushyireho ifoto cyangwa PDF maze menu yawe ikorwe ako kanya.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Shyiraho ameza yawe (Table 1, VIP Section, Terrace, n’ibindi) kandi ukore QR (Impishabanga shusho) zidasanzwe kuri buri meza — byose ubikoreye kuri dashboard yawe. Zicapishe uzishyire ku meza.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Huza nimero yawe ya WhatsApp kugira ngo ubone ubutumwa bw'ibicuruzwa (commande) ako kanya na raporo za buri munsi. Emera MTN MoMo na Airtel Money kugira ngo kwishyura byorohe.
how_it_works.step5_desc: Ongeraho ibicuruzwa byo mu bubiko, shyiraho aho wongera kubitumiza, kandi ukurikirane buri gikorwa cyo kugura. Bona iburira rya AI igihe ibiciro byiyongereye cyangwa ububiko bugiye gushira.
how_it_works.step6_desc: Abakiriya basikana kode za QR bagakora commande, igikoni kigahita kibona imenyesha, kandi ubwishyu bugakorwa mu buryo bwikora. Kurikirana imibare y’ubucuruzi, tegura promo, kandi wagure ubucuruzi bwawe nta mpungenge.
how_it_works.cta_subtitle: Kora konti yawe — bifata iminota 2 gusa!

faq.heading: Ibibazo Bikunze Kubazwa
faq.subtitle: Amafaranga yo Kwishyura na Politiki z'Urubuga

contact.heading: Ufite ibindi bibazo?
contact.body: Itsinda ryacu rifasha riri hano kugufasha! Tuvugishe igihe cyose.
contact.hours_value: Kuwa mbere - Ku cyumweru, 8:00 AM - 10:00 PM

0.q: Kuki hari amafaranga ya serivisi ku kwishyura kuri sisitemu?
0.a: Amafaranga ya serivisi 5% akoreshwa mu kurinda kwishyura, kurwanya uburiganya, kwemeza kwishyura ako kanya, no guhuza ibikorwa. Ibi byemeza ko kwishyura kwawe ari nta kibazo bifite, byihuse kandi byanditswe neza. Kwishyura mu mafaranga (cash) nta kiguzi.

1.q: Nigute nshobora kwirinda amafaranga ya serivisi?
1.a: Wishyure mu mafaranga (cash)! Amafaranga ya serivisi akoreshwa gusa ku kwishyura ukoresheje ikarita na mobile money. Niwishyuye mu mafaranga, wishyura ibiciro byanditse gusa nta yandi yiyongereye.

2.q: Ni ayahe mafaranga make n'ayahe manini?
2.a: Amafaranga make ni RWF 100 (ku byatumijwe bito) naho menshi ni RWF 3,500 (kugira ngo bigume mu buryo bw'ubutabera ku byatumijwe binini). Ntuzigera urenza RWF 3,500 y'amafaranga ya serivisi, uko itumizwa ryaba rinini.

3.q: Ibishimbo bishyirwa mu kubara amafaranga ya serivisi?
3.a: Oya. Ibishimbo ntibyibarwa mu mafaranga ya serivisi. Amafaranga abarwa gusa ku itumizwa ryawe ry'ibiryo n'ibinyobwa, si ku bishimbo uhitemo gutanga.

4.q: TVA iri mu mafaranga ya serivisi?
4.a: Yego. Amafaranga ya serivisi 5% agaragazwa harimo TVA. Ibi bivuze ko igiciro ubona ari cyo wishyura — nta misoro ihishe yongerwa igihe usoza kwishyura.

5.q: Ni ubuhe buryo bwo kwishyura bufite aya mafaranga?
5.a: Amafaranga ya serivisi akoreshwa ku kwishyura ukoresheje ikarita (Visa, Mastercard) na Mobile Money (MTN, Airtel). Amafaranga (cash) no kohereza kuri banki nta kiguzi.

6.a: Ku byatumijwe binyuze kuri marketplace, abagurisha bishyura komisiyo: 10% + TVA ku bashya, 7% + TVA ku basanzwe, na 5% + TVA ku bagurisha benshi (barenga RWF 5M/ukwezi). Iyi komisiyo ikubiyemo serivisi z'urubuga, kwamamaza no gutunganya kwishyura.

7.a: Yego! Kwishyura kwose gutanga inyemezabuguzi yemewe ya EBM igaragaza ibisobanuro by'itumizwa ryawe, amafaranga ya serivisi (niba ahari), isesengura rya TVA, n'umubare wose. Uzayahabwa kuri email kandi ushobora no kuyareba kuri konti yawe.

8.q: Niba mfite ikibazo ku mafaranga yaciwe?
8.a: Niba wumva wishyuriwe nabi, hamagara itsinda ridufasha kuri support@imboni.resto cyangwa +250 788 917 126. Tuzasuzuma ibikorwa byawe kandi dukemure ikibazo mu masaha 24–48.

9.q: Aya mafaranga azahinduka mu gihe kizaza?
9.a: Dushobora guhindura amafaranga bitewe n'uko isoko rihagaze n'ibiciro byo gukora. Impinduka zose zizatangazwa nibura iminsi 30 mbere binyuze kuri email no ku rubuga. Ushobora gusoma politiki igezweho ku rupapuro rw'Amabwiriza n'Amategeko.

banner.text: Dukoresha cookies kugirango tunoze uko ukoresha urubuga, dusuzume imikoreshereze, no kugaragaza ibisubizo bikubereye.

priorityActions.title: Ibikorwa by'ingenzi
priorityActions.subtitle: Biteguwe hakurikijwe igipimo cy'ingaruka ku mbaraga. Tangirira kuri ibi kugira ngo ubone umusaruro mwinshi.

tip.body: Ibanze ku bikorwa bifite "Imbaraga Nto + Ingaruka Ninshi" kugira ngo ubone intsinzi zihuse. Banza urangize ibikorwa 3 bya mbere, hanyuma ongera ukoreshe isesengura urebe uko byahindutse.

qr_builder_extended.instruction_1: Hitamo template ku ruhande rw'ibumoso. Iyi tool ikora QR posters cyangwa amakarita yo gucapa/gusangira.
qr_builder_extended.instruction_2: Hitamo Ubwoko bwa QR (Imeza, Ishami, Gutumiza Mbere, Kujyana). Ku Meza, hitamo imeza yo gushyira mu QR link.
qr_builder_extended.instruction_3: Hindura ibara, ubutumwa, n'URL y'ikirango/ishusho (optional). Menu n'ibintu biracungwa ahandi mu Dashboard → Menu.
qr_builder_extended.instruction_4: Kanda Bika Design (optional), hanyuma Download PNG cyangwa SVG kugira ngo ucape cyangwa usangire.
qr_builder_extended.note_menu_managed_elsewhere: Icyitonderwa: Ibi ntibyubaka menu yawe. Bikora gusa designs zihuza menu yawe isanzwe.
qr_builder_extended.tip_templates_support_images: Inama: Templates zimwe zifite ishusho. Shyira URL mu "Logo / Image URL" kugira ngo ushyiremo ikirango cyawe.
qr_builder_extended.select_template_desc: Hitamo template mu rutonde kugira ngo utangire
qr_builder_extended.no_tables_found: Nta meza yabonetse. Kora ameza mbere.
qr_builder_extended.logo_optional_note: Optional. Ikoreshwa na templates zifite ishusho.
qr_builder_extended.embed_warning: Emera guhindura hanyuma ukande buto kugira ngo ushyire ishusho mu QR code.
qr_builder_extended.no_qr_codes_desc: Kora QR code yawe ya mbere uhitamo template hanyuma ukande "Bika Design"

order_page.share_text: Reba iyi menu! Tumiza ubu hanyuma twombi twinjize 500 RWF:

seat_selection.title: Hitamo Intebe Yawe
seat_selection.subtitle: Hitamo intebe ihari ku meza yawe
seat_selection.seat_taken_error: Iyi ntebe yafashwe. Nyamuneka hitamo iyindi.

security.title: Ikigo cy'Umutekano
security.subtitle: Genzura ibiganiro byawe no gusuzuma ibikorwa bya konti yawe
security.two_factor_desc: Buri gikorwa cyo kwinjira gisaba kwinjiza kode y'imibare 6 yoherezwa kuri imeli yawe na/cyangwa WhatsApp.
security.no_sessions: Nta hantu winjiye hari gukora ubu
security.tip_1: Ntuzigere usangira kode yawe yo kwinjira n'umuntu uwo ariwe wese, harimo n'abafasha ba Imboni Serve.
security.tip_2: Niba ubona kugerageza kwinjira utazi, kuraho ibiganiro byose ako kanya.
security.tip_3: Koresha ijambo ryibanga rikomeye kandi ridasanzwe kuri konti yawe.
security.tip_4: Buri gihe sohoka ku bikoresho bisangiwe nyuma yo kubikoresha.
security.revoke_confirm: Kuraho ibiganiro byose bikora? Uzasohoka ahantu hose.

loyalty.title: Ubudahemuka bw'Abakiriya
loyalty.subtitle: Genzura amanota n'ibihembo by'abakiriya
loyalty.unlock_message: Sisitemu y'Ubudahemuka ifungurwa ku bakiriya 20 bakora kuri gahunda ya Professional+
loyalty.unlock_desc: Abakiriya binjiza kandi bakoresha amanota mu nzira zose

profile.title: Umwirondoro wo Kuvumburwa
profile.subtitle: Urutonde rwawe rusange rw'ubucuruzi ku murongo wa Imboni
profile.unlock_message: Isoko ryo Kuvumburwa rifungurwa ku bakiriya 20 bakora
profile.unlock_desc: Kora umwirondoro rusange kugirango ugaragare ku murongo wa Imboni
profile.profile_visible: Umwirondoro wawe uragaragara mu isoko ryo kuvumburwa
profile.tagline_placeholder: urugero, Inyama igoye nziza muri Kigali
profile.description_placeholder: Bwira abakiriya icyatuma ahantu hawe ari hiza...

site_builder.title: Gukora Urubuga
site_builder.subtitle: Kora urubuga rwawe rwiza mu minota mike
site_builder.templates_hero_subtitle: Tangiza urubuga rwa resitora yawe mu minota mike ukoresheje inyandikorugero zateguwe
site_builder.benefit_beautiful_desc: Inyandikorugero zakozwe n'abahanga ku bwoko bwose bw'ibiryo
site_builder.benefit_quick_desc: Injira kuri murandasi mu minota iri munsi ya 5 utanditse kode
site_builder.benefit_mobile_desc: Inyandikorugero zose zigaragara neza ku bikoresho byose
site_builder.choose_template_desc: Shakisha inyandikorugero zakozwe n'abahanga zihuye na resitora, kafe, n'ubucuruzi bw'ibiryo
site_builder.preview_text: Iki ni igishushanyo cy'urubuga rwawe hamwe n'amabara n'imyandikire byatoranijwe.
site_builder.content_sections_desc: Hitamo ibice wifuza gushyira kuri urubuga rwawe

hero.title: Icyiciro Nyamukuru
hero.desc: Akabendera k'ingenzi hamwe n'umurongo wawe muto

site_builder.publish_desc: Kora urubuga rwawe rugaragare ku bakiriya
site_builder.use_own_domain: Koresha domaine yawe bwite (urugero, www.ubucuruzibwawe.com) aho gukoresha subdomain ya Imboni.
site_builder.note_text: Domaine .tk na .ml ntizishyigikiwe. Nyuma yo gusaba, uzakira amabwiriza yo gushyiraho DNS.
